_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of industry technologies and how differences affect exploitation/vulnerabilities.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of the data and AI vendor ecosystem, including major platform providers, emerging technology categories, vendor lock-in risks, open-source alternatives, and strategic partnership evaluation criteria.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-013 (SP, cosine: 0.528), OP-K-002 (OP, cosine: 0.522).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.457). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [affect, differences, exploitation, industry, technologies, vulnerabilities] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, alternatives, categories, criteria, data, ecosystem] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.883, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of industry technologies and how differences affect exploitation/vulne" and "Knowledge of the data and AI vendor ecosystem, including major platform provider" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.559 > STS 0.457 (gap +0.101). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [affect, differences, exploitation, industry, technologies, vulnerabilities]. WIDAI-only: [ai, alternatives, categories, criteria, data, ecosystem].

signals.detail: STS 0.457 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
